title: Nursery Rhyme. CCCCLXXXI. Love And Matrimony.
content:
Oh! mother, I shall be married to Mr. Punchinello.
        To Mr. Punch,
        To Mr. Joe,
        To Mr. Nell,
        To Mr. Lo.
        Mr. Punch, Mr. Joe,
        Mr. Nell, Mr. Lo,
        To Mr. Punchinello.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Unknown, titled "Nursery Rhyme. CCCCLXXXI. Love And Matrimony.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
